channel.title: 安卓应用 on M2kar - Security World
channel.description: Recent content in 安卓应用 on M2kar - Security World

item.title: 【论文笔记】FIRMSCOPE：自动化发现安卓系统应用的提权漏洞
item.description: 标题: FIRMSCOPE: Automatic Uncovering of Privilege-Escalation Vulnerabilities in Pre-Installed Apps in Android Firmware 作者: Mohamed Elsabagh, Ryan Johnson,..,Chaoshun Zuo 关键字: 论文笔记, 系统安全, 安卓应用, 提权漏洞 来源: sec20 链接: 引用: Elsabagh, Mohamed, Ryan Johnson, Angelos Stavrou, Chaoshun Zuo, Qingchuan Zhao, and Zhiqiang Lin. “
